# CANDIDATE: BULLISH_CONFLUENCE_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** filter_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The bull setup (BULLISH_RECLAIM) exhibits low win rate (28%) and modest average profit (+7.8/trade) due to taking low-quality entries lacking confluence. Requiring confluence as a mandatory condition (in addition to the existing ≥2 triggers requirement) will filter out noise, increasing win rate and average profit per trade. This aims to match or exceed the bear confluence gate performance (+18.6/trade, n=16) without introducing DRAFT promotion risk.

## Mechanism

Current bull setup requires ≥2 of 3 triggers: level reclaim, EMA ribbon flip, confluence. Proposed gate modifies this to require confluence (mandatory) AND at least one of the other two triggers (level reclaim OR EMA ribbon flip). Entry timing, contract selection, stop, and target rules remain identical to BULLISH_RECLAIM. Exit logic unchanged: TP1 at +30% premium or first major intraday support/resistance, runner stops at breakeven after TP1, ribbon-reentry or massive runner exit.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account per risk-rules table; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L due to 3-contract minimum.
2. **Sample bias:** Based on G_BULL_only (n=120 trades, +7.8/trade, WR 0.28) and G_BEAR_conf (n=16, +18.6/trade). Bull sample may reflect regime-specific bias; overfit risk mitigated by walk-forward validation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: missed bullish winners → zero P&L on bullish trend days
   - Max drawdown: consecutive losses in reduced trade set could exceed 20% account drawdown
   - Blow-up scenario: gate failure during strong bullish momentum → large losses on few taken trades
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (top-5 days % of P&L TBD)

## Confidence

6 / 10 -- Bear confluence gate shows strong performance; bull analogue plausible but untested. Requires OOS validation to confirm edge persistence.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements existing bull-related candidates (BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE, NAMED_LEVEL_WICK_BOUNCE_BULL) and does not conflict with bear candidates. Pure filter change to BULLISH_RECLAIM setup; no new trade class introduced. No overlap with leaderboard ranks 1-21.
